evidence_label: branch-review handoff status refresh, not treatment advice
pubmed_query: (transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia OR transfusion dependent thalassemia) AND (exagamglogene OR gene therapy OR hematopoietic cell transplantation OR allogeneic OR iron overload OR transfusion burden OR cost-effectiveness) AND (2026[dp])

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_hct
guideline_sources.role: supports allogeneic HCT as a specialist branch question requiring private clinical review

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_gene_manipulation
guideline_sources.role: supports autologous gene-cell therapy as a distinct specialist branch question requiring collection, conditioning, manufacturing, and follow-up context

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_transfusion
guideline_sources.role: supports transfusion-burden and response labels before any branch interpretation

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_iron_overload
guideline_sources.role: supports iron and organ-risk labels before any branch interpretation

pubmed_records.title: Second allogeneic hematopoietic cell transplantation after graft failure is an effective curative option in children with hemoglobinopathies.
Assessment of hepatic fibrosis in Egyptian children and adolescents with beta thalassemia major: a single center study.

registry_records.label: ClinicalTrials.gov_TDT_gene_cell_search
registry_records.query: Transfusion-Dependent Beta-Thalassemia AND exagamglogene OR gene therapy OR hematopoietic stem cell transplantation

decision_use: These sources support keeping the public repo at label-only handoff status until private packet readiness and qualified clinician review are complete. They do not support public diagnosis, eligibility, therapy selection, referral, trial screening, travel, import, purchase, dosing, transfusion changes, chelation changes, lab contact, private-message routing, or sample routing.
